MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication, By Defendants San Francisco First Tee, Inc. Dba The First Tee Of San Francisco And Judith Powell; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Separate Statement Of Undisputed Material Facts; Declarations Of Briana M. Pendergrass And Jonathan Lee
Off Calendar Jul-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Briana Monahan Pendergrass, of Daly & Heft LLP, Tel. 858.755.5666, for defendants;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS JUDITH POWELL, SAN FRANCISCO FIRST TEE, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Defendants' proof of service demonstrates that defendants provided at least 75-days notice per CCP 437c. Defendants timely served the motion. The court grants summary judgment. Defendants' undisputed facts show that plaintiffs were not damaged (Defendants' Undisputed Facts 44-53). Plaintiffs do not dispute any of defendants' facts. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
